CAUSE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. PL. PRESENT W/JEFF MAR- GULIES AS COUNSEL. DEFS. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIP. W/JUDGMENT FOR PL. - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 1523 GOLDEN GATE AVE, #2, S.F, CA. - WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO MIDNIGHT, 5-18-94 - VACATING IS LEAV- ING KEYS & NOT WITH PL. - FORFEITURE OF RENTAL AGREEMENT - RENT & DAMAGES WVD. - DEF. WARRANT THERE ARE NO OTHER OCCU- PANTS W/RIGHT OF POSSESSION - NO FURTHER STAYS ON EVICTION - MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS - IF DEFS. FAIL TO VACATE, JUDGMENT MAY INCLUDE $2,500 RENT & DAMAGES - UPON VACATING AS AGREED, PL. WILL S/A & DISM IF DEFS PROVIDE THE APPROPRIATE PAPERS. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
